headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Stock Could Be A Bargain Despite Its 34% Run
summary: Genuine Parts has just logged a 34.4% gain over the past month, yet both its Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples still point to the stock trading at a discount, raising the question of whether the market is recalibrating too slowly to the latest news and plans around its automotive division. The 34.4% move in the past month signals a sharp reset in expectations, likely tied to the cash offer for the NAPA auto parts division and the prospect of a more...

headline: 3 Dividend Kings to Buy in July
summary: Dividend Kings, companies with at least 50 consecutive years of dividend increases, are the quiet backbone of an income portfolio. Heading into July, three of them stand out for different reasons: One is the textbook compounding consumer staple, one is a turnaround with a catalyst on the clock and one is the high-yield income workhorse. ... 3 Dividend Kings to Buy in July

headline: Genuine Parts (GPC) Gets Reported Offer For Its Auto Parts Division
summary: O'Reilly Automotive has reportedly made a significant acquisition offer for Genuine Parts' auto parts division. The proposal would focus specifically on the automotive parts operations within NYSE:GPC, rather than the entire company. If completed, this could be O'Reilly's largest acquisition since 2008 and would represent a material corporate action for Genuine Parts. Genuine Parts, traded as NYSE:GPC, is a diversified distributor with a large presence in automotive replacement parts and...
